HEADING: AI Agents
INTRO_TEXT: AI agents watch for events in your community and respond. Give each agent a personality in its initial prompt, pick which events should trigger it, and it will use its available tools - posting comments, voting, moderating, awarding badges - to act on your behalf. FastComments uses AI providers that don't train on your data.
CREATED_FROM_TEMPLATE_BANNER: Created from the {templateName} template. Review the settings below, then change status to Enabled when you're ready.
NO_AGENTS_MESSAGE: You haven't created any AI agents yet.
UPSELL_SUBHEAD: Spin up AI agents that read every new comment, reply in your voice, escalate the hard calls, and ship badges when a contributor goes above and beyond. You stay in control of every action.
UPSELL_BILLING_HEADING: Add valid billing to bring your agents online.
UPSELL_BILLING_SUBHEAD: AI agents stay dormant until there's a working payment method on file. Update your billing info and they'll pick up where they left off.
UPSELL_CAP_MODERATE_DESC: Flag, hide, or escalate comments the moment they cross the rules you've written.
UPSELL_CAP_WELCOME_DESC: Greet first-time commenters, answer onboarding questions, and point them to your community guidelines.
UPSELL_CAP_REPLY_DESC: Write considered, on-brand replies using your style prompt and the full thread context.
UPSELL_CAP_AWARD_DESC: Hand out badges when a contributor helps another reader or lifts the thread.
UPSELL_REASSURE_BUDGETS: Daily and monthly budget caps per agent. Hard stop, no surprises on the invoice.
UPSELL_REASSURE_DRYRUN: Every agent starts in dry-run mode so you can watch what it would do before going live.
UPSELL_REASSURE_CANCEL: Pause or delete any agent instantly. Approvals can gate every sensitive action.
UPSELL_PLAN_FOOTER: Available on the Flex and Pro plans.
NO_AGENTS_SUB: Start from a ready-made template or write a custom personality from scratch. Every agent launches in dry-run so you can watch it work before going live.
AGENT_LIMIT_BANNER_HEADING: You've filled every agent slot on this plan.
AGENT_LIMIT_BANNER_SUB: Upgrade to add more agents, or edit an existing one.
DELETE_CONFIRM: Delete this agent? Its run history will also be removed.
DELETE_DIALOG_BODY: Delete {name}? Its run history will be removed too. This cannot be undone.
DELETE_FAILED: Failed to delete the agent. Please try again.
CLONE_DIALOG_BODY: Create a copy of {name}? The clone will start in dry-run mode so you can review and rename it before enabling.
CLONE_FAILED: Failed to clone the agent. Please try again.
INTERNAL_NAME_HINT: Short identifier used in admin dashboards.
DISPLAY_NAME_HINT: Shown publicly when the agent posts a comment.
STATUS_OPTION_DISABLED_HINT: The agent is turned off and will not run.
STATUS_OPTION_DRY_RUN_HINT: The agent runs and logs what it would do, but takes no real action. Use this to tune the prompt before going live.
STATUS_OPTION_ENABLED_HINT: The agent takes real actions on comments and users.
MODEL_HINT: Pick the model this agent should use.
MAX_TOKENS_HINT: Total token budget for one agent run, summed across the whole tool-loop. Higher values let the agent take more tool-calling turns before being cut off; individual LLM responses are still capped separately. Leave blank for the default ([default]).
BUDGET_HINT: Caps how much this agent can spend before it stops dispatching. Shown in your account currency.
DAILY_BUDGET_HINT: Leave blank for no daily cap. The agent pauses until midnight UTC once reached.
MONTHLY_BUDGET_HINT: Leave blank for no monthly cap. The agent pauses until the next calendar month once reached.
ALERT_THRESHOLDS_HINT: Billing admins get an email when spend crosses each checked percentage. Defaults to 80% and 100%.
INITIAL_PROMPT_HINT: System prompt defining the agent's personality, tone, and goals. Plain text, no template syntax.
INITIAL_PROMPT_PLACEHOLDER: You are a welcoming community moderator. Greet new commenters, steer conversation away from toxicity, and escalate spam.
CONTEXT_HINT: Include extra context in the prompt. More context makes decisions better but increases token cost per run.
CONTEXT_THREAD_LABEL: Include parent comment and prior replies in the same thread
CONTEXT_USER_HISTORY_LABEL: Include commenter's trust factor, account age, ban history, and recent comments
CONTEXT_PAGE_LABEL: Include page title, subtitle, description, and meta tags
CONTEXT_GUIDELINES_HINT: Optional policy text prepended to every prompt. Use this to describe your tenant's moderation rules so the agent can apply them consistently.
CONTEXT_GUIDELINES_PLACEHOLDER: No personal attacks. No political campaigning. Links to external sites are allowed only from verified users.
SCOPE_HINT: Optional. One URL pattern per line. The agent only runs on comments whose page URL matches one of these patterns. Use glob syntax: '/news/*' matches any page under /news. Leave blank to run on every page in this tenant.
LOCALES_HINT: When checked, the agent only runs on comments whose detected locale is in the selected list. Leave unchecked to run on every locale.
TRIGGERS_HINT: Pick at least one event. The agent runs each time one occurs.
TRIGGER_COMMENT_VOTE_THRESHOLD: A comment crosses a vote threshold
TRIGGER_MODERATOR_SPAMMED_COMMENT: A moderator marks a comment as spam
TRIGGER_COMMENT_FLAG_THRESHOLD: A comment crosses a flag threshold
TRIGGER_NEW_USER_FIRST_COMMENT: A user posts their first comment on this site
TRIGGER_COMMENT_AUTO_SPAMMED: A comment is auto-captured as spam by the system
VOTE_THRESHOLD_HINT: The agent runs when a comment reaches this many net votes.
FLAG_THRESHOLD_HINT: The agent runs the moment a comment's flag count reaches exactly this value.
TRIGGER_DELAY_HINT: Optional. Wait this long after the trigger fires before running the agent. Useful for triggers like flagging where you want votes/reports to settle first. Leave blank or 0 to run immediately. Maximum 30 days.
ALLOWED_TOOLS_HINT: Control which actions this agent is allowed to take. Unchecked tools are hidden from the model entirely, not just gated behind approval. Leave 'Allow any tool calls' checked to keep the full toolset.
BAN_CONFIG_HINT: Extra powers the agent may use when banning a user. Each one is hidden from the model entirely until you opt in here, so the agent can only request what you allow.
BAN_ALLOW_DELETE_COMMENTS_LABEL: Allow deleting all of the user's comments
BAN_ALLOW_DELETE_COMMENTS_HINT: When checked, the agent can choose to delete every comment the banned user has posted on this tenant. Use this for clear spam or coordinated abuse where the existing content has no value.
BAN_ALLOW_IP_HINT: When checked, the agent can choose to also ban the IP address the comment was posted from. Useful against alt-account ban evasion. Avoid for shared IPs (corporate, school, mobile carrier) where innocent users may be blocked.
APPROVALS_HINT: Select actions that must be approved by a human before the agent executes them. Approvals only apply to tools the agent is allowed to invoke; disallowed tools are refused outright.
APPROVALS_EU_DSA_NOTICE: EU DSA Article 17: user suspensions require human review. "Ban a user" is locked on and cannot be fully automated in the EU region.
APPROVALS_EU_LOCKED_TOOLTIP: Locked on by EU DSA Article 17 - fully-automated bans are not permitted in the EU region.
NOTIFICATIONS_HINT: Who should be emailed when an approval is queued?
NOTIFY_MODE_ALL_ADMINS_HINT: Fan out to every account owner, admin, or comment moderator on this tenant.
NOTIFY_MODE_SPECIFIC_USERS_HINT: Only the users you pick below receive approval emails.
NOTIFY_USERS_HINT: Move users to the right column to give them approval notifications.
NOTIFY_NO_REVIEWERS: No admins or moderators available on this tenant yet.
NEVER_TRIGGERED_STAT: This agent has not been triggered yet.
NO_RUNS_MESSAGE: No runs yet for this agent. Enabled runs appear here once a trigger fires; use Test run to preview what this agent would do against past comments.
NO_ACTIONS_MESSAGE: No actions were taken during this run.
NO_TRANSCRIPT_MESSAGE: No transcript was recorded for this run.
ANALYTICS_NO_DATA: No activity yet for this period.
ANALYTICS_AGENT_CAP_ALERTS_HEADING: Agents at or near their cap
ANALYTICS_AGENT_CAP_ALERTS_NONE: No agents are near their per-agent caps right now.
ERROR_NAME_REQUIRED: Please provide both an internal name and a display name.
ERROR_TRIGGER_REQUIRED: Please select at least one trigger.
ERROR_VOTE_THRESHOLD_REQUIRED: Please set a vote threshold of 1 or more when the vote-threshold trigger is selected.
ERROR_FLAG_THRESHOLD_REQUIRED: Please set a flag threshold of 1 or more when the flag-threshold trigger is selected.
ERROR_TRIGGER_DELAY_INVALID: Please set a delay between 0 and 2,592,000 seconds (30 days).
ERROR_ALLOWED_ACTIONS_EMPTY: Select at least one tool, or check 'Allow any tool calls'.
ERROR_SCOPE_TOO_MANY: Too many URL patterns. Please list 50 or fewer.
ERROR_SCOPE_PATTERN_INVALID: One of the URL patterns is invalid. Patterns must use url-pattern glob syntax, for example '/news/*'.
ERROR_LOCALES_INVALID: One or more locale IDs are not recognized. Use IDs like en_us or zh_cn, comma-separated.
ERROR_NOT_FOUND: That agent could not be found.
ERROR_GENERIC: Something went wrong while saving. Please try again.
ERROR_BILLING_INVALID: AI agents require valid billing on file. Please update your billing info to continue.
ERROR_NOT_IN_PLAN: Your current plan does not include AI agents. Please upgrade to enable them.
ERROR_AGENT_LIMIT_REACHED: You have reached the maximum number of agents for your plan.
REPLAY_TEST_RUN_CONFIRM: Start a new test run for this agent?
DELETE_CANNOT_BE_UNDONE: This will permanently delete the agent, its triggers, and its identity. This cannot be undone.
TEST_RUN_DESCRIPTION: This will run the agent against a sample of past comments to preview what it would do. No real actions are taken. This will incur token cost.
TEST_RUN_DAYS_LABEL: Days of historical comments to evaluate
TEST_RUN_DAYS_HINT: Between 1 and [max] days. Older comments are not eligible.
TEST_RUN_SAMPLE_LIMIT_INFO: Up to [limit] comments from this window will be processed.
TEST_RUN_NO_COMMENTS: No comments in this window. Pick a wider range.
REPLAY_RATE_LIMITED_TOOLTIP: You've reached 10 test runs in the last 24 hours.
REPLAY_MODAL_BODY: Run this agent against past comments to preview what it would do. No real actions are taken.
REPLAY_CAPPED_AT_LIMIT: Hard cap reached. Stopped at {count} comments.
REPLAY_WINDOW_TRUNCATED_WARNING: {matched} comments matched; processed the first {processed}. Narrow the window to cover the rest.
REPLAY_CONTEXT_NOTE: Context used: current thread and user state (replay does not reconstruct historical context).
REPLAY_ERRORS_BANNER: {count} of {total} triggers failed before producing a verdict. Inspect the rows marked Error below for the underlying LLM/runtime error.
REPLAY_EVIDENCE_SPAM_EVENT: Blocked by spam engine at ingest
REPLAY_EVIDENCE_NONE: No negative events; comment approved and clean
REPLAY_ERROR_WINDOW_INVALID: Please choose a valid date range.
REPLAY_ERROR_WINDOW_TOO_LARGE: Replays are capped at 90 days. Please narrow the window.
REPLAY_ERROR_RATE_LIMITED: You've reached 10 test runs in the last 24 hours.
REPLAY_ERROR_CONCURRENT: Another test run is already in flight. Redirecting...
REPLAY_ERROR_GENERIC: Could not start the test run. Please try again.
REPLAY_ERROR_BUDGET_AGENT_DAILY: This agent's daily token budget was hit before the replay could finish. Raise the agent's daily budget or wait for the daily reset.
REPLAY_ERROR_BUDGET_AGENT_MONTHLY: This agent's monthly token budget was hit before the replay could finish. Raise the agent's monthly budget or wait for the monthly reset.
REPLAY_ERROR_BUDGET_TENANT_DAILY: Your account's daily AI agent budget was hit before the replay could finish. Raise the daily limit or wait for the daily reset.
REPLAY_ERROR_BUDGET_TENANT_MONTHLY: Your account's monthly AI agent budget was hit before the replay could finish. Raise the monthly limit or wait for the monthly reset.
REPLAY_ERROR_BUDGET_QPS: The agent's per-second rate limit was hit during the replay. The run was halted to avoid runaway spend.
REPLAY_ERROR_BUDGET_CONCURRENCY: Too many agent runs were already in flight. The replay was halted to avoid backpressure.
REPLAY_ERROR_MAX_ATTEMPTS: The replay failed multiple times in a row and was abandoned.
REPLAY_ERROR_BILLING_INVALID: Billing information is invalid. Update payment details to run replays.
REPLAY_ERROR_PACKAGE_NO_AGENTS: Your current plan does not include AI agents. Upgrade to enable replays.
REPLAY_ERROR_TENANT_NOT_FOUND: The site backing this replay could not be found.
REPLAY_ERROR_UNKNOWN: The replay failed unexpectedly. See details below.
